hospitalizations.principal_dx_description: Malignant neoplasm of upper-outer quadrant of left female breast
hospitalizations.reason: Planned left partial mastectomy (lumpectomy) with wire localization, sentinel lymph node biopsy, and axillary lymph node dissection levels I-II

medications.frequency: once per cycle, day 2 of each ddAC cycle
day 1 of each infusion cycle (ddAC and paclitaxel)
nightly days 1-4 of each ddAC cycle
premedication before each weekly paclitaxel infusion

medications.dose: 1000 mg/m2 BID (reduced to 750 mg/m2 BID after cycle 2)
